name: Sleep Number Corp
business: Sleep Number sells personalized smart mattresses and sleep wellness products directly to consumers through its exclusive direct-to-consumer distribution model, including 600 retail stores and online.

exposures.sentence: By combining artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) technology, which "learn from each sleeper over time," the Sleep Number smart bed allows sleepers to understand metrics related to health and wellbeing during sleep.

Embedded digital sensors learn the sleep needs of each individual; sense and do technology uses the sensed data to automatically adjust the smart mattress to keep the sleeper comfortable throughout the night.
Sleep Number is the leader in personalized sleep wellness.
